title: klisia #2828
definition:
1) a hut erected to pass the night in
 2) a tent
 3) anything to recline on
    3a) a chair in which to lean back the head
    3b) a reclining chair
 4) a company reclining
    4a) a row or party of persons reclining at meal
nasbUsage:
